attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY		SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY			 	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER 					BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
ESCT.NAME  								BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
SUCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME 					START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST(SUCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)  	START_SSP_DATE,
'3500-01-01 00:00:00' 					END_TV_DATETIME,
'3500-01-01' 							END_SSP_DATE,
SUCLSC.SPLIT_PERCENT 					SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
SUCLSC.SOURCE_TYPE 						SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
EST_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  			SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE ,
SUCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID  					SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
USER 									EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 									EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  					EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  					EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
SSCA.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT					SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
'=' 									ACTION_CODE,
'=' 									DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_UO_CSM_LINE_SALES_CREDITS SUCLSC
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUCLSC.SOURCE_LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT SSCA 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSCA
				ON( NSSC_SSCA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSCA.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID=SSCA.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SSCA.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESR
	ON(SUCLSC.SALESREP_ID=ESR.SALES_REP_ID AND ESR.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') 
INNER JOIN	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
	ON(SUCLSC.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID=ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_HIER
	ON (SUCLSC.TERRITORY_ID=EST_HIER.TERRITORY_ID AND EST_HIER.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'  )	
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
INNER JOIN 
	(  
		 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_CR_ASGN_FOR_APPLD_TRX    NSCAFAT 
   			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSO
             ON  NSSC_SSO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSCAFAT.SS_CD
              AND NSSC_SSO.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'  AND   NSCAFAT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  = 'N'
     )
     ON NSCAFAT.SK_HEADER_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = SUCLSC.HEADER_SEQ_ID 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 
SUCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID ORDER BY SUCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1

SELECT
SSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY		SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY			 	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER 					BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
ESCT.NAME  								BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
SBCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME 					START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST(SBCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)  	START_SSP_DATE,
'3500-01-01 00:00:00' 					END_TV_DATETIME,
'3500-01-01' 							END_SSP_DATE,
SBCLSC.SPLIT_PERCENT 					SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
SBCLSC.SOURCE_TYPE 						SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
EST_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  			SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE ,
SBCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID  					SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
USER 									EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER 									EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  					EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  					EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
SSC.ASK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT					SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, /* Added as part of Sales Credit Adj Feb CDR Release */
'=' 									ACTION_CODE,
'=' 									DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_BO_CSM_LINE_SALES_CREDITS SBCLSC
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBCLSC.SOURCE_LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT SSCA 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSCA
				ON( NSSC_SSCA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSCA.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID=SSCA.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SSCA.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESR
	ON(SBCLSC.SALESREP_ID=ESR.SALES_REP_ID AND ESR.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') 
INNER JOIN	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
	ON(SBCLSC.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID=ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_HIER
	ON (SBCLSC.TERRITORY_ID=EST_HIER.TERRITORY_ID AND EST_HIER.GLOBAL_NAME='BO'  )	
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
INNER JOIN 
	(  
		 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_CR_ASGN_FOR_APPLD_TRX    NSCAFAT 
   			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSO
             ON  NSSC_SSO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSCAFAT.SS_CD
              AND NSSC_SSO.GLOBAL_NAME='BO'  AND   NSCAFAT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  = 'N'
     )
     ON NSCAFAT.SK_HEADER_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = SBCLSC.HEADER_SEQ_ID      
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 
SBCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID ORDER BY SBCLSC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
